name: ecofieldops
description: Modern geospatial operations platform inspired by my work at Gaia Ecologie. EcoFieldOps combines a React + Mapbox GL front end with a GraphQL API powered by Node.js, Apollo Server, PostgreSQL (Drizzle ORM), and OpenAI-backed summarization jobs. The goal is to show how I build data-heavy field dashboards that map missions, collect reports, and ship AI-assisted insights.
